what_to_implement.module_signature: run_swing_backtest(start: date, end: date, capital: float = 1_000_000, walk_forward: bool = True, config: dict | None = None) -> dict
main_loop_pseudocode: trade_dates = sorted unique trade_dates in [start, end]
# T = current eval date; T+1 = execution date
sells = {tk for tk, action in exits.items() if action.startswith('sell')}
# apply sells at T+1 open (or carry if limit-down)
halves = {tk for tk, action in exits.items() if action == 'take_profit_half'}
target_weights = compute_target_weights(signal_scores, panel, T, sector_mapping, config)
buys = {tk: w for tk, w in target_weights.items() if tk not in positions or w > current_w(tk) + 0.01}
# apply buys at T+1 open (or carry if limit-up)
executed_trades = execute_at_T_plus_1(buys, sells, halves, daily_panel, T)

execution_rules.limit_up_unfillable: if T+1 open >= T_prev_close * 1.099 AND we want to BUY → mark UNFILLABLE, carry to T+2 (max 3 days, then drop)
execution_rules.limit_down_unfillable_sell: if T+1 open <= T_prev_close * 0.901 AND we want to SELL → carry to T+2 (forced hold + emergency stop -15%)
execution_rules.slippage: 0.10% per side (already approximated in blended fill price; add explicit if not)

walk_forward_logic.weights_recalibration: NONE for v1 — weights are spec-set a-priori (per Junyan: no curve-fit). Walk-forward IS only validates parameter stability not refit.

metrics_output.headline: CAGR / Sharpe (annualized) / MaxDD / Calmar / volatility / turnover_ann
metrics_output.alpha_vs_csi300: Bootstrap CI on (strat_daily_returns - csi300_daily_returns) using scripts/stationary_bootstrap.py
metrics_output.ff_attribution: From scripts/ff_attribution.py (need daily versions of MKT/SMB/HML/WML)
metrics_output.per_year_breakdown: annual return + DD + Sharpe per calendar year

what_to_implement.output_format: JSON to public/data/swing_backtest_v1.json + per-day artifacts to public/data/swing_daily/YYYY-MM-DD.json
what_to_implement.PIT_discipline: Engine never queries panel data with trade_date > T at evaluation step T. All exits + sizing decisions made at T-close, executed at T+1-open.

selftest_requirements: Synthetic: 30 stocks × 2 years daily; verify engine runs end-to-end, equity curve makes sense (no NaN, monotone-ish from buys/sells), turnover reasonable, costs deducted correctly.
Limit-up unfillable: construct fixture where target buy is at +10% limit-up → verify UNFILLABLE log entry, no fill.
Hard stop: verify when position triggers -8% MTM, sells at T+1 open.
out_of_scope: Real Tushare data fetch (already done in upstream tasks)
owner_after_handoff: codex (writes), claude_t1 (runs walk-forward on real data + stat gate)
